scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npx cross-env ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron ./node_modules/@angular/cli/bin/ng.js serve
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:electron"
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build -- --configuration production
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && rm -rf dist-backend && dotnet publish -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained true -o dist-backend
scripts.build:backend:arm64: cd backend && rm -rf dist-backend && dotnet publish -c Release -r linux-arm64 --self-contained true -o dist-backend
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.package:arm64: npm run build:backend:arm64 && npm run build:frontend && electron-builder --linux --arm64 -c.linux.target=dir
scripts.deploy-to-rpi: npm run package:arm64 && rsync -avz --delete release/linux-arm64-unpacked/ kruno@rpi:~/dashberry/
